page_metadata.biotools__summary: Software package for inferring highways of horizontal gene transfer in the evolutionary history of a set of species. It takes as input a collection of unrooted gene trees along with a rooted species tree.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Software package for inferring highways of horizontal gene transfer in the evolutionary history of a set of species. It takes as input a collection of unrooted gene trees along with a rooted species tree.
